mapper.select: SELECT * FROM thuchiencongviec WHERE ma_nv = #{maNv} AND ma_cong_viec = #{maCongViec}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO thuchiencongviec (ma_nv, ma_cong_viec, ngay_bat_dau, ngay_ket_thuc, dung_han, ghi_chu) VALUES (#{maNv}, #{maCongViec}, #{ngayBatDau}, #{ngayKetThuc}, #{dungHan}, #{ghiChu})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM thuchiencongviec WHERE ma_nv = #{maNv} AND ma_cong_viec = #{maCongViec}
